paper_metadata.title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
paper_metadata.abstract: The BigCode community, an open-scientific collaboration working on the responsible development of Large Language Models for Code (Code LLMs), introduces StarCoder and StarCoderBase: 15.5B parameter models with 8K context length, infilling capabilities and fast large-batch inference enabled by multi-query attention. StarCoderBase is trained on 1 trillion tokens sourced from The Stack, a large collection of permissively licensed GitHub repositories with inspection tools and an opt-out process. We fine-tuned StarCoderBase on 35B Python tokens, resulting in the creation of StarCoder. We perform the most comprehensive evaluation of Code LLMs to date and show that StarCoderBase outperforms every open Code LLM that supports multiple programming languages and matches or outperforms the OpenAI code-cushman-001 model. Furthermore, StarCoder outperforms every model that is fine-tuned on Python, can be prompted to achieve 40\% pass@1 on HumanEval, and still retains its performance on other programming languages. We take several important steps towards a safe open-access model release, including an improved PII redaction pipeline and a novel attribution tracing tool, and make the StarCoder models publicly available under a more commercially viable version of the Open Responsible AI Model license.

extraction_data.innovation: StarCoderBase is a 15.5B parameter decoder-only language model trained on a diverse corpus of code and natural language text, enabling strong performance on both code generation and natural language understanding tasks. Its key innovation lies in leveraging a large-scale, mixed-code-and-text pretraining corpus to support multitask capabilities, including code and language reasoning.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: GitHub code, natural language data (7% GitHub issues, 10% Markdown, 2% Jupyter notebooks, 4% HTML)
extraction_data.application: Code generation, natural language reasoning, math problem solving (GSM8K), question answering (CoQA, MMLU), documentation generation, interactive assistant tasks
extraction_data.research_problem: Code and natural language understanding, code generation, and reasoning in large language models
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on code and natural language tasks
extraction_data.extension: Includes a Bloom-filter-based membership checking tool and a BM25-powered search index for code attribution and training data overlap detection.
extraction_data.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

extraction_data.innovation: StarCoder introduces a large-scale language model trained on a diverse corpus of open-source code, enabling strong code generation and completion capabilities through causal language modeling. It is designed to support multiple programming languages and complex code synthesis tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale code corpus (including public GitHub repositories)
extraction_data.research_problem: Code generation and programming language understanding
extraction_data.application: Code generation, code completion, program synthesis, software development assistance
extraction_data.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
